questions.stem: Ariel ___ every night for a week before her Chinese test and got a very good grade.
questions.explanation: 從整句時態可知，考試已經結束了，為了考試每晚念書的整個事件為過去事件，用過去簡單式，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: The police haven't found the little girl who ___ at a supermarket. They'll keep doing all they can to find her.
questions.explanation: 由「找小女孩」可推知她是「被帶走的」，用過去被動式「was＋過去分詞」，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Have you found a summer job yet? Mr. Firth ___ someone to take care of his kids during the vacation. Maybe you can talk to him.
questions.explanation: 由後句建議對方可以去跟 Firth 先生聊聊，表示 Firth 先生是「正在找」可以照顧孩子的人選，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Yesterday when I got home from work, my brother ___ for dinner, so he invited me to join him.
questions.explanation: 抵達家的時候，弟弟「正要去吃晚餐」，因此用過去進行式，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Aunt Gina has lived in this town for more than sixty years, so she ___ it very well.
questions.explanation: 前句用現在完成式說明 Gina 住在鎮上超過 60 年，可推知她對鎮上很了解，為一現在事實，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Paul misses his parents a lot. He ___ them since he came to work in Taiwan a year ago.
questions.explanation: 此處的 since 做連接詞，表「自從......」，句型為「現在完成式＋since＋過去簡單式」，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Listen! The baby ___ in the bedroom. Why don't you go in and take a look?
questions.explanation: 關鍵字為 Listen!，要人傾聽，表示事情「現在正在進行」，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: My sister is coming to my home today. She ___ with me for a week.
questions.explanation: 「今日將會前來」，因此「將會」與我同住一週，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Mozart ___ his first music when he was only six years old.
questions.explanation: when 子句的時態為過去式｢當他只有六歲時」，可推知前面描述亦為當時的事件，也應用過去式，故選 (D)。。

questions.stem: I don't have any money with me because I ___ my wallet this morning.
questions.explanation: 由「我身上沒有任何的錢」可知，我在今天早上弄丟了錢包，表達過去發生的事用過去式，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: I ___ a bath when someone turned off the light. I was scared and shouted for help.
questions.explanation: 由 when someone turned off the light（當某人關掉電燈）可知動作發生在過去，且為了強調動作的持續及正在進行，所以用過去進行式，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: The medicine I ___ you this morning should be taken three times a day.
questions.explanation: 「給藥」的動作在今天早上已發生，故用過去式，故選 (D) gave。

questions.stem: B&J Café ___ known as the tallest building in town. However, O&G Restaurant became the tallest building in 2010.
questions.explanation: 第二句出現過去時間點 2010 年。由上下文可知，第一句「B&J Café 成為城中最高建築」這件事情發生在第二句「O&G飯店成為（城中）最高建築」之前，須用過去完成式表示，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Nana：Did you mail the cards to your teachers? Annie：No, I want to check them again. I ___ them after dinner.
questions.explanation: 晚餐過後才要把卡片寄出去，表示尚未做此動作，須用未來式描述即將發生的事情，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Abby：Too bad you couldn't come to the beach with us. It was so much fun there! You must come next time. Bree：No, thanks. I don't think ___ any fun. I can't swim.
questions.explanation: 由 Bree 回應 No, thanks.（不，謝謝。），可知道她拒絕 Abby 邀約她下次去海邊玩的提議。本句用現在簡單式 I don't think... 則是因為本句話為她現在的想法，但因為「下次去玩」屬於尚未發生的事情，因此空格中應用未來式表示，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Alex：Why are you still here? It's almost eight o'clock. Tom：Because I ___ my work. Don't worry. It's almost done.
questions.explanation: 工作「尚未」做完，故用現在完成式 haven't finished。

questions.stem: Candy has decided to move to Taipei next year. When she studies in an art school there, she ___ with her aunt for five months.
questions.explanation: 主要子句 she ___ with her aunt 描述未來將發生的事，When 引導的時間副詞子句雖用現在式（studies），但主句仍需用未來式 will live，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Mom：What ___ after school today? Ryan：Well, I just read some comic books.
questions.explanation: Ryan 回答「我剛讀了漫畫書」，說明事情已發生在「今天放學後（after school today）」，這是過去時間點，故用過去式 did you do，選 (A)。

questions.stem: Tommy is looking for the watch his uncle ___ him on his birthday.
questions.explanation: 手錶是叔叔「在生日那天給他的」，表示已在過去發生的動作，用過去簡單式 gave，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Mom：Peter, be sure to finish your school report before you go to bed. Peter：OK, Mom, I ___.
questions.explanation: 母親使用的是祈使句，可判斷 Peter 應該尚未完成報告，而 Peter 回答「好的」，即確認他的確尚未完成報告，故選 (D) 完成式的助動詞，表示 Peter同意「會」在交代的時間完成。

questions.stem: Betty ___ fake watches when the police came.
questions.explanation: when the police came（警察來的時候）為過去時間點，Betty「正在賣」假錶為當時持續進行的動作，用過去進行式 was selling，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Lisa：What ___ this morning? Tina：Well, it\'s Sunday. I think I\'ll go to church with my father.
questions.explanation: Tina 回答說今天是星期天，並表示她打算去教堂，因此問句是在問「今天早上打算做什麼」，為未來計畫，用 are you going to do，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Betty ___ TV when her little brother fell off the chair.
questions.explanation: when her little brother fell off the chair（弟弟摔下椅子時）為過去時間點，Betty「正在看」電視，用過去進行式 was watching，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Jack：There is going to ___ a dance show on Saturday. Would you like to go with me? Nina：Sure, I can\'t wait for it.
questions.explanation: There is going to be 是「there be」句型的未來式，表示「將有」，be 動詞不可換成 do/get/have，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: The fishermen knew little about the island when they ___ there.
questions.explanation: 由句s中動詞 knew 為過去簡單式，且句意在說明當漁夫們到達時，對島上所知甚少的事實，可知應選時態同為過去簡單式的 arrived；而選項 (B)、(C)、(D) 皆不是簡單過去式；故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Mrs. Smith ___ the movie very much. She has seen it three times.
questions.explanation: 後句說她已看了三次，可知她「現在很喜歡」這部電影，為現在事實用現在簡單式 likes，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Ryan：Would you like to play tennis with me? Dara：No, thanks. ___ it for three hours already. I'm tired now.
questions.explanation: Dara 說「我已打了三個小時，現在很累」，用現在完成式表示從過去持續到現在的動作，故選 (C) I've played。

questions.stem: Tina ___ hamburgers for lunch every day last week.
questions.explanation: Tina上禮拜每天都吃漢堡當午餐。句末的every day last week表示事情發生在過去，而且為一常態，所以動詞用過去簡單式即可，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Excuse me. I really need to go now. My kids ___ for me at school.
questions.explanation: 關鍵字為 now，表達「現在」必須走，表示孩子們目前「正等著（are waiting）」他 / 她，故須選「現在進行式」。

questions.stem: On Children's Day, Ms. Lee, a famous storybook writer, ___ to Molly's Bookstore to talk about her new book. My two little kids can't wait to see her.
questions.explanation: 關鍵詞 can't wait to see her （等不及要見她）表示前述事情尚未發生，但即將發生，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: We ___ Aunt Polly for a long time, so we visited her last weekend.
questions.explanation: 拜訪 Polly 阿姨為上週己發生的事，而「我們很久沒有見到她」是比拜訪阿姨更早之前發生的事，應用「過去完成式」表達，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Lily：When will Uncle Tom come to see me? Mom：He'll visit us this weekend. He ___ me that by e-mail.
questions.explanation: 由母親的回答可之她已經知道湯姆叔叔何時要來，表示湯姆叔叔已經藉由電子郵件的方式告知她，故選 (A) 過去式動詞。

questions.stem: See? The strange man I saw yesterday ___ around my house again. Should I call the police?
questions.explanation: (who / that) I saw yesterday為形容詞子句，用來形容 The strange man，表「我昨天看到的那名陌生男子」；See? 為 Do you see that? 的簡述，表示說話者「當下」又看到那名陌生男子在他家附近遊蕩，因此須用「現在進行式」，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Sam: ___ you have a good time at Mr. Moore's house tonight? Tom: Yes. It was a wonderful party. I'm glad I went.
questions.explanation: Sam：今天晚上你在 Moore 先生家玩的愉快嗎？\ Tom：是啊。那是個很棒的派對。我很高興我有去。根據 Tom 的回答可知，在 Moore 先生家的派對已經結束了，所以整個對話的時態應為過去簡單式，故答案選 (B)。

questions.stem: No one thought James would appear at Katie's party. So when he ___, everyone was surprised and could not believe their eyes.
questions.explanation: when 用來引導兩件同時發生的事情。由上下文可知，when 引導的附屬子句缺過去簡單式動詞 appeared (at Katie's party)，寫作時為避免重複，可以過去簡單式助動詞 did 代替，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Peter ___ a trip to Yangmingshan and had a good time.
questions.explanation: 句末 had a good time（玩得很開心）為過去式，可知整個事件是過去的旅遊，空格也應用過去式 took，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Tom ___ ten pounds over the past two months. He looks much thinner now.
questions.explanation: over the past two months 表「過去到現在這兩個月期間內」，再從第二句 now 可判斷，前一句在講述「一件事情持續至今」，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: The woman you met in the library yesterday ___ our school a lot of books.
questions.explanation: 空格需搭配先行詞 the woman，且描述「將捐書」的未來動作，故選 will give，選 (D)。

questions.stem: *Smart Head*, one of the hottest TV programs these days, ___ people free plane tickets to Hawaii if they can answer 20 questions correctly in 15 minutes.
questions.explanation: 逗號間的 one of the hottest TV programs these days 為同位格，真正的主詞為電視節目 *Smart Head*，故選描述事實的現在簡單式單數動詞 (B)。

questions.stem: John：Have you seen my comic books, Jean? Jean：___ on your desk yesterday, but Mom took them away this morning.
questions.explanation: Jean 說昨天看到書在桌上（yesterday），為過去事實，用過去式 They were，選 (C)。

questions.stem: Tom：Jean, ___ to the movies with us tonight? Jean：Sorry, I can\'t. I have an important exam tomorrow.
questions.explanation: Tom 邀請 Jean 今晚一起去電影院，詢問計畫用 are you going to，表示「你打算去嗎？」，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: The weather ___ rainy and cloudy in the last few days. I hope the sun will come out soon.
questions.explanation: 關鍵詞為 in the last few days，「在過去幾天都」陰雨綿綿，因此會期望能快點放晴；描述「從過去持續到現在的狀況」，要用「現在完成式」，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Christine：Dad, I\'m hungry. Do we have anything to eat? Mr. Chen：You can have some bread I ___ from the supermarket. It\'s on the table.
questions.explanation: 「我從超市買來的麵包」，買麵包的動作已在過去完成，用過去簡單式 bought，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Stella is a baseball fan. She ___ more than one hundred pictures of famous baseball players.
questions.explanation: Stella 是棒球迷，她「擁有」超過一百張圖片，用現在簡單式 has 表示現在的狀態，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Alice：Have you ever been to a baseball game? Jamie：No, never. ___ Alice：Sure. Baseball is my favorite sport.
questions.explanation: Alice：你有沒有去看過棒球比賽？\ Jamie：不，從來沒有。你呢？\ Alice：當然有。棒球是我最愛的運動。\ 根據第一句對話，可知詢問過去經驗使用現在完成式，故反問對方是否也有同樣經驗時也用現在完成式。

questions.stem: She ___ to the department store and bought two new sweaters for her husband.
questions.explanation: and bought two new sweaters 為過去式，表明去百貨公司也是過去的動作，用過去式 went，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Andy：Did Mary ___ that square watch? Lucy：Yes, she just bought it.
questions.explanation: Andy 用過去式 Did Mary ___ 提問，空格應填原形動詞 buy（搭配 Did），故選 (A)。

questions.stem: My brother doesn't live with us. He ___ out after he got married.
questions.explanation: 我哥哥不和我們住在一起。他結婚後就搬出去住了。第二句的時間子句中的時態為過去簡單式，故主要子句中的時態亦同。

questions.stem: Mom: Linda, you've been playing computer games all evening! Have you finished your report? Linda: Well, ___ most of it this afternoon, and I'll finish it by Friday.
questions.explanation: 由 Linda 回應後半句「我週五前會完成報告」，推知今天下午已經完成大部分，應用過去簡單式，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: I can't tell you what I think of the movie because I ___ it. I'll probably watch it this Saturday.
questions.explanation: 由後句「可能這週六會看」，可知目前還沒看過，應用現在完成式表示至今尚未做的事，故選 (C)。

topics.name: 主題2 be 動詞、助動詞

questions.stem: Our teacher Ms. Wu seldom laughs, but when she ___, everyone in the same building can hear her.
questions.explanation: 助動詞的功用之一，是避免重複某一動詞；此處要避免重複的動詞為現在簡單式的 laughs，因此，助動詞要選現在簡單式第三人稱單數的 does，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: ___ the dog that bites people yours? You should keep it home.
questions.explanation: the dog 為第三人稱單數，需選用第三人稱單數 be 動詞 Is，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Ken's brothers like to watch tennis, but Ken ___. He is crazy about baseball.
questions.explanation: 由前半句的動詞 like 可知為現在簡單式，又連接詞 but 的前半句為肯定語氣，故後半句須為否定語氣，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Melody has a great interest in planting flowers, but her sister ___. She can't even stay in the garden for one minute.
questions.explanation: 本題考對等連接詞 but 的用法，前句「Melody 對種花很有興趣」為現在簡單式，故 but 所接的句子也應為現在簡單式，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Mom：Oh, no! Your sister forgot her sports shoes. When ___ she have PE class? Can you take the shoes to her school? Peter：It's in the afternoon. Don't worry. I'll bring them to her.
questions.explanation: 由上下對話可知媽媽是在詢問 Peter 的姐姐何時有體育課，由上下語意可知時態為現在簡單式，又因 she 是第三人稱單數，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Becky：Do you like watching cooking programs on TV? Diana：No, I don\'t, but my twin brother ___. He\'s very fond of cooking.
questions.explanation: Diana 說不喜歡，但 but 後面表示她哥哥喜歡，用代動詞 does（代替 likes watching），故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Jane：Did you get up early this morning? Tina：No, I didn\'t, but my brother ___. He gets up early every day.
questions.explanation: Jane 說她沒有，but 後表示哥哥有（get up early），因前面是 Did 問句，代動詞用 did，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Allen：___ you have twenty minutes right now? I need to talk to you. Bruce：Sure! Come on in.
questions.explanation: 句子問的是「你現在有二十分鐘嗎？」，have 當一般動詞（擁有時間），用 Do you have，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: At first, my bookstore's business ___ not very good. But now it is doing quiet well.
questions.explanation: 剛開始，我書局的生意不怎麼好，但是現在還不錯。此題在敘述事情的變化「剛開始......但現在......」。剛開始講的是過去的事，因此動詞須用過去式。又因good為形容詞，因此可知前面的動詞應為be動詞，因此答案選 (C)。

questions.stem: Jane always does well on English test, but her sisters ___.
questions.explanation: 主詞 her sisters 為複數，對應助動詞需用複數 don't，且 Jane 做好表示妹妹們「不做好」，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Frank read a comic book yesterday, but his brother ___.
questions.explanation: 前句 Frank read（過去式），but 後表示哥哥沒讀，代動詞需對應過去式否定 didn't，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Linda：Do you have to get up early in the morning? Peter：Yes, I ___. I can't be late for school.
questions.explanation: Linda 問的是 Do you have to...，Peter 回答 Yes，代動詞要對應 do，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Betty goes jogging every day in the park, and Allen ___, too.
questions.explanation: Betty 去慢跑（go jogging），Allen 也做同樣的事，代動詞代替 goes jogging 用 does，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Paul：___ Shelly's father a businessman? Carl：I don't think so. I remember he teaches English.
questions.explanation: 主詞 Shelly's father 為第三人稱單數，且為 be 動詞問句，用 Is，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Ms. Wu：What animals ___ your sister like? Herbert：She likes lions and tigers.
questions.explanation: your sister 為第三人稱單數，一般動詞 like 的問句用 does，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Simon：Why ___ Jerry and Lisa play cards with us? Henry：Because they want to go to the movies.
questions.explanation: 主詞 Jerry and Lisa 為複數，否定疑問句用 don't，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: David：Have you seen John's sister? Kevin：Yes, I ___. She's the most beautiful girl I've ever seen.
questions.explanation: Kevin 回答 Yes, I ___，此為現在完成式問句 Have you seen...，代動詞用 have，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Many of my classmates have had the experience of taking an airplane, but I ___.
questions.explanation: 前句 have had，but 後用現在完成式否定代動詞 haven't，表示「我還沒有過這個經驗」，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: He ___ at home. He\'s in his office now.
questions.explanation: He's in his office 說明他在辦公室，表示他「不在」家，用 isn't，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: The cellphones that ___ in that country are good but expensive.
questions.explanation: that 為關係代名詞，在關係子句中指先行詞「手機」，而手機是「被製造」的，被動語態為「be 動詞＋過去分詞」，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Mr. Chen has a loud voice. His voice can ___ clearly even in that big classroom.
questions.explanation: can 後需接原形動詞，且聲音是「被聽到」，用被動式 be heard，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: These pictures ___ when we took a trip to Kenting National Park.
questions.explanation: 照片是「被拍的」，動作發生在過去旅遊時，用過去被動式 were taken，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: A new road is going to ___ in town because traffic is getting busier and busier.
questions.explanation: be going to 後接原形，且道路是「被建造」，用被動 be built，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: My dog Jimmy loves ___ with a comb. Every time I comb his hair, he will close his eyes and fall asleep.
questions.explanation: 雖然 love 之後可接動名詞（V-ing）或不定詞（to V），但第二句點出 Jimmy 是「被梳理的」，故選有被動式的 (D)。

questions.stem: Alison doesn't like ___ what to do. She only does things she wants to do.
questions.explanation: 由後句可知，Alison 只做自己想做的事，可知她不喜歡「被告知」該做什麼，故用被動式 be told，而 like 後可接 to V，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Many famous people visit this restaurant. Popular singers like A-mei and Jay Chou ___ here with their friends.
questions.explanation: like A-mei and Jay Chou 為 popular singers 的後位修飾，表示「像......」，因此本句缺動詞；而 seen 為 see 的過去分詞，句中要有 be 動詞來形成被動語態，表示「被看見」，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Susan：Oh, no! The door and the window ___! Victor：Who could have done this? Susan：Go in quickly and see if we\'ve lost anything.
questions.explanation: 門窗是「被打破的」，發現時已成既成事實，用現在完成被動或過去被動，此處選過去被動 were broken，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: The housework in Mr. and Mrs. Wang's family ___ between them and their kids. Everyone's got their own job to do.
questions.explanation: 家事應該被分工，要用被動語態「be 動詞＋p.p.」，而主詞 The housework 為不可數名詞，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Buses to the airport only come once every hour, and we just missed ___. Why don't we take a taxi?
questions.explanation: 末句說「何不改搭計程車」，表示錯過了一班，用 one 來代稱其中但不特定的一班，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Nora：Can I check your drawer for some tools we can use? Matt：Sure. Take a look. See if you can find ___ in there.
questions.explanation: 要找 some tools，即「未指定」工具，因此不會選有指定意思的 (B)、(C)、(D)。而 any 可做代名詞，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Tom：I need an eraser. Can I use yours? Judy：Sure. I'm not using ___ now.
questions.explanation: Judy 的回答是指自己的橡皮擦，兩人都知道「說的是哪一個已指定物品」，故用 it 代指。

questions.stem: I think ___ is more fun to go to the movies with my friends than with my family.
questions.explanation: 我覺得跟朋友去看電影比跟家人去有趣多了。故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Susan bought ___ bread in the supermarket, but she did not buy anything to drink.
questions.explanation: bread（麵包）為不可數名詞，只有選項 (B) 的 some 與選項 (C) 的 any 可與不可數名詞連用，而 some 通常用於肯定句，any 則用於否定句，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Mrs. Luo：Who put these socks in the refrigerator? Mr. Luo：I don't know. They're not ___. Ask your son.
questions.explanation: 由上下文可推測，空格應指my shocks，當前面已提過同一事物時，可以用所有格代名詞代替，意思同於「所有格＋名詞」，因此故選 (B)。

questions.stem: ___ exercise after work is a good way for me to forget the troubles in the office.
questions.explanation: exercise 當名詞用時，動詞用 do 表示「做運動」，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: ___ of my sisters are older than I am. I'm the youngest of the three children in my family.
questions.explanation: 由後句可知共有「三個孩子」，扣掉說話者本身，可知是其「兩位姐姐」，兩位的數量代名詞用 both，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: My mom told me to take care of ___ in England. She worried that I couldn't eat or sleep well there.
questions.explanation: 第一句補充說明第二句的內容。依句意，母親擔心說話者（第一人稱的 me、I）在英格蘭（there → England）無法吃好、睡好，可推斷母親是要說話者照顧好「說話者自己」，故選表第一人稱的反身代名詞 (B)。

questions.stem: Kate：Earl, is that tall boy your brother? Earl：Yes, ___. Kate：But you two look so different!
questions.explanation: Kate 問的是 Earl 的兄弟（tall boy），Earl 回答「是的，他是（he is）」，用人稱代名詞 he，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: ___ of the books on the desk is about the famous writers of our country.
questions.explanation: 空格後接單數動詞 is，需選單數代名詞，One of the books 意指「其中一本」，故選 (D) One。

questions.stem: Ms. Johnson has been taking phone calls since she entered the office this morning. Just when she thought she could finally leave work, \_\_\_\_\_ call came in.
questions.explanation: 由句意可知，Johnson 女士到辦公室後就一直接到電話，而在以為終於可以離開時，又有電話打來了，表示「沒有指定的另一通電話」，應用 another，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: The book under Mary's desk is ___, but I don't know why it is there.
questions.explanation: 由「在 Mary 的書桌下的那本書是『我的』」可知，空格須使用所有格代名詞 mine 代替前面所提過的名詞 book，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: John and Susan gave ___ a nice jacket as a Christmas present.
questions.explanation: gave me 為動詞後的間接受詞，需用受格 me，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Andy：What do you think of these postcards? Lucy：Oh, I love ___. They\'re beautiful.
questions.explanation: love 後接受詞，postcards 已提及用代名詞替代，受格複數用 them，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Yesterday was my daughter\'s birthday. We took ___ to a restaurant and had a big dinner.
questions.explanation: took ___ to a restaurant，受詞代替 daughter（女兒），用受格 her，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: My wife enjoys going to the movies with her friends, but I like to watch TV at home by ___.
questions.explanation: 由 but 可知，對比妻子喜歡跟朋友一起看電影，說話者更喜歡「自己」在家看電視，應用反身代名詞 myself，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Sue：Your hat looks so comfortable! Ann：It's more than comfortable. If you wear a hat like ___, you won't feel cold on a windy day.
questions.explanation: Ann 建議戴一頂「像這樣的帽子（one like this）」，this 指眼前這頂帽子，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: I don't like any one of these three watches. Can you show me ___ one?
questions.explanation: one ＝ a watch，代替前面「已提過、未指定」的單數可數名詞，而「other＋複數可數名詞」、「another＋單數可數名詞」，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: There are many trees in the park. ___ of them are over fifty years old.
questions.explanation: many trees 的樹中，「大部分」超過五十年，用 Most，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Elsa：Do you know anymore from Class A? Jeff：No, I don't know any of \_\_\_\_\_.
questions.explanation: any of ___，後面需接受格，they 的受格是 them，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Mrs. Wang has two sons. ___ of them go to junior high school.
questions.explanation: Wang 太太有「兩個」兒子，兩個都讀國中，用 Both（兩個都），故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Paula：Is that big toy store Mr. and Mrs. Chen\'s? Kelly：Yes, it\'s ___. My daughter loves going there.
questions.explanation: 問 Is it Mr. and Mrs. Chen's？答 Yes, it's ___，theirs 代替「他們的（店）」，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: This restaurant makes delicious chicken rice, so ___ always full of people at mealtime.
questions.explanation: 主詞是「這家餐廳（this restaurant）」，用單數 it is，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: I was told to interview three guys at different times today. The first was on time. The second was late, and ___ never came.
questions.explanation: 四個選項分別為 (A)「最後一個（人）」、(B)「唯一的一個（人）」、(C)「有些（人）」、(D)「另一個（人）」。關鍵詞為第一句的「今天不同時段的三個人」，第二句則分別敘述這三個人的狀況，第一個準時到、第二個遲到，而第三個也是今天的最後一個未出現，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: On the way to work, Natasha was surprised to find she was wearing a white earring on one ear and a gray earring on ___.
questions.explanation: 在 Natasha 上班途中，她很驚訝地發現她一隻耳朵戴白色的耳環，而「另一隻耳朵」戴灰色的耳環。要表達兩個當中剩下的那一個，須用代名詞 the other，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Tony：Will you go to Cindy's party tonight? Jane：No, I have to do my homework. Don't you have ___? Tony：Well, I already finished it at school.
questions.explanation: Tony：你今晚會不會去Cindy的派對？\ Jane：不，我必須寫作業，你沒有作業嗎？\ Tony：這個嘛，我在學校就寫完了。\ 測驗所有格代名詞的用法，本題選yours，代表「你的作業」。

questions.stem: Mike：I heard there are many monkeys in this mountain. But I didn't see any of them last time when I was here. Carl：Hope we can see ___ today.
questions.explanation: 希望今天能看到猴子，用 some（一些），表期待看到幾隻，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Mary got two dolls from her grandfather on her birthday, and she liked ___ very much.
questions.explanation: she liked ___ very much，受詞代替 two dolls（複數），用 them，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: I don't think Katie will read any one of the books you've picked out for her: ___ look(s) very boring.
questions.explanation: you've picked out for her 為形容詞子句，省略了當受格的關係代名詞 that / which，所以 the books 為 picked out 的受詞，意思為「你為她選的書」，而「書」為複數，故選 (D)，表示 Katie不會讀你為她選的書，因為「它們」都很無聊。any one of 在此的功用是加強語氣。

questions.stem: Tina：The bread looks delicious! You want to buy some? Carl：I\'d love to, but I don\'t have ___ money with me now.
questions.explanation: 否定句中表示「任何...都沒有」用 any，I don't have any money，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Elise：I need a dress for tomorrow's party, but I don't have one. Fiona：Why don't you try on my red one? I bought ___ last week.
questions.explanation: 由前句 Why don't you try on my red one?（你何不試試我那件紅色的？）和上句 Elise 說 I need a dress\...（我需要一件洋裝......），可知空格應是指 Fiona 上週買的「那件紅色的洋裝」，故用 it 代替，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: I haven't been to the movies these days. Are there any good ___ this week?
questions.explanation: 由前句提到 I haven't been to the movies these days.（我這陣子都沒有去看電影。），可知說話者應是想詢問「這禮拜有任何不錯的（電影）嗎？」，ones 是代替前面提過但未特別限定的名詞，而在本句中是不限定的用法，故選 ones，選 (A)。

questions.stem: Gary：I can't find my pen. Nina：Is the one on Jack's desk ___? Gary：Yes, thank you.
questions.explanation: yours 是 your 的所有格代名詞，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Alice: This cake is so delicious! Where did you buy it? Oscar: I didn't buy it. I made it ___!
questions.explanation: 本題為測驗人稱代名詞的概念。依據題意，蛋糕是「自己做的」，應選反身代名詞 (D) myself。

questions.stem: My grandfather spends ___ of his free time reading newspapers.
questions.explanation: most of his free time 表示「大部分的空閒時間」，most 修飾不可數名詞 time，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Jenny's bag is very heavy because ___ filled with toy cars.
questions.explanation: 依句子結構，because 引導的副詞子句缺主詞，故不會選形成存在句的 (C) 或 (D)；依句意，Jenny 的「袋子」會沉重的原因是因為「袋子」裡塞滿了玩具車，而 Jenny 的「袋子 (bag)」為單數，故選 (A)，讓 it 代替前面提到過的 Jenny's bag。

questions.stem: Philip：Is that red car Miss Brown\'s? Walter：Yes, it\'s ___. Beautiful, isn\'t it?
questions.explanation: 問 Is it Miss Brown's？答 Yes, it's ___，Miss Brown 為女性，所有格代名詞用 hers，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Cell phones are convenient; every person in my family has ___.
questions.explanation: every person 每個人都有「一支」手機，用 one 代替單數名詞 a cell phone，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Nana and Fred are good friends, and ___ are baseball fans.
questions.explanation: Nana and Fred 兩人都是棒球迷，用 both of them，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Spring is a wonderful season because ___ is usually warm and sunny.
questions.explanation: 春天是一個美好的季節，因為它通常溫暖且晴朗。(A) 哪一個 (B) 這 (C) 一個 (D) 它。主要子句描述春天是一個美好的季節，because副詞子句說明春天天氣通常溫暖且晴朗。在英文中以it代替天氣，故答案選(D)。

questions.stem: Beatrice loves to draw apples. You can see ___ in her notebooks, on her letters, and even on her school bag!
questions.explanation: 由前句提到 Beatrice loves to draw apples.（Beatrice 喜歡畫蘋果。）可知，下句表達可以在她的筆記本、在她的信裡，甚至在她的書包上可以看到「它們」，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: ___ of the students in my school do not have the experience of going to a foreign country. Only a few do.
questions.explanation: 後句說 only a few do（只有少數有出國），可知大部分沒有，用 Most，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: It almost killed Kevin to take care of his baby sister for one afternoon. He wondered how his mom could do ___ every day.
questions.explanation: 本題考代名詞，用以代替之前提過的人、事或物。此處則是代替上一句提過的「照顧妹妹」這件「事」，要用單數代名詞 it，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: I want to find another dentist because ___ pulled out a good tooth last time I went to him.
questions.explanation: 本句用所有格代名詞「mine」表「my dentist（我的牙醫）」，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Chris loves walking with Anna on snowy days, but Anna hates ___ very much.
questions.explanation: 本句用代名詞 it 代替前句提到「下雪天去散步」這件事，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: I did not do my homework, so my teacher said I ___ stay after school to finish it.
questions.explanation: 沒有做功課，老師應會說「必須」放學後留下來完成，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: The pie at your party ___ good. Where did you buy it?
questions.explanation: 你宴會上的派「嚐起來」很美味。你在哪裡買的？故選 (D)。

questions.stem: The students got ___ when they saw their favorite movie star eating at the next table.
questions.explanation: get 為連綴動詞，後接形容詞作補語，表示「變得興奮」用 excited（形容詞），故選 (A)。

questions.stem: If I finish my homework before eight o'clock, my parents will let me ___ TV for one hour.
questions.explanation: let 為使役動詞，後接受詞再接原形動詞（let + O + V），故用 watch，選 (A)。

questions.stem: There\'s a subway station near my house. ___ takes me only ten minutes to get to my office.
questions.explanation: It takes me... 為固定句型「花某人...時間」，It 為虛主詞代替後面的不定詞片語，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Jenny plays the piano very well. Her mother makes her ___ two hours every day.
questions.explanation: make 為使役動詞，後接受詞再接原形動詞（make + O + V），故用 practice，選 (A)。

questions.stem: Cindy cried out when she saw a motorcycle ___ into her cat.
questions.explanation: see 為感官動詞，後面要接原型動詞(bump)或是動名詞(bumping)，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Mrs. Wilson ___ her son wash the dishes after dinner.
questions.explanation: 使役動詞(make, let, have)要接原型動詞 (wash)，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Bruce：When did Roger change his job? Laura：He hasn't changed his job. He still works in the same computer store. Bruce：But I saw him ___ watches on the street corner.
questions.explanation: see 為感官動詞，後面要接原型動詞(sell)或是動名詞(selling)，故選 (D)

questions.stem: The teachers make us ___ harder by giving us tests.
questions.explanation: 使役動詞(make, let, have)要接原型動詞 (study)，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: The little boy jumped up and down happily when he saw a bee ___ into the house.
questions.explanation: see 為感官動詞，後面要接原型動詞(fly)或是動名詞(flying)，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Studying in a foreign country ___ me a lot of money. That's why I had to sell my apartment.
questions.explanation: 動名詞(studying in a foreign conutry)當主詞視為一件事情，且後方提到money，符合cost的用法。事物當主詞+cost+錢。

questions.stem: It took the police lots of time ___ who entered Liu's house and killed her one year ago.
questions.explanation: It takes / took＋人＋時間＋to V，表示「某事花了某人多少時間」，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: When I was walking along the river, I saw some fish ___ out of the water.
questions.explanation: see 為感官動詞，後面要接原型動詞(jump)或是動名詞(jumping)，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Mike：When did Laura become a taxi driver? Jerry：She is NOT a taxi driver. She\'s a nurse. Mike：But I saw her ___ a taxi yesterday! Jerry：Oh, maybe it was her younger sister!
questions.explanation: see sb. + V-ing 表示「看到某人正在做某事」，Mike 看到她「正在開」計程車，故用現在分詞 driving，選 (A)。

questions.stem: Dennis enjoys ___ in public. He is proud of his beautiful voice.
questions.explanation: enjoy 後接動名詞（enjoy + V-ing），Dennis 喜歡「在公眾面前唱歌（singing）」，因為他以自己的美聲為榮，故選 (D) singing。

questions.stem: People got very excited when they watched Ms. Smith ___ at the party.
questions.explanation: watch sb. + V-ing 表示「看著某人（正在）做某事」，人們看著 Ms. Smith「正在跳舞」，用現在分詞 dancing，故選 (B)。

topics.name: 主題6 不定詞、動名詞、分詞、虛主詞 it

questions.stem: Although it took me lots of time ___ a big meal for ten people, I was happy that everyone enjoyed it.
questions.explanation: 花費動詞 take（花......時間）後方動詞用不定詞to＋V，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Playing sports at least three times a week ___ good for your health.
questions.explanation: 動名詞（Playing...）當主詞表單數，而空格後為形容詞片語 good for（對......好），故空格應填入表單數的 be 動詞，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: The most convenient way to get around this small town is ___ a bike.
questions.explanation: 不定詞片語可當主詞補語，其位置放在 be 動詞之後。本題翻譯為「逛這個小鎮最方便的方法是騎腳踏車。」，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: ___ in the daytime is not good for you. You may not sleep well at night and feel tired the next day.
questions.explanation: 由句中有 be 動詞 is 可知本句不是祈使句，所以不能選原形動詞，應使用能當主詞的動名詞，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: I usually carry a camera on my trips; taking pictures ___ a good way for me to remember the experience.
questions.explanation: 動名詞當主詞視為單數，且句中無動詞，故需使用 be 動詞 is，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Learning foreign languages ___ me to know more about other countries.
questions.explanation: asking questions 作主詞（動名詞片語視為單數），動詞應接第三人稱單數 helps，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Asking questions ___ Henna learn more and better.
questions.explanation: 主詞 Asking questions 為動名詞片語視為單數，動詞用 helps，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: It was important for Kevin ___ his homework quickly because he had to help his parents sell fruit in the night market.
questions.explanation: It was important for Kevin to finish，it 為虛主詞，真正主詞為 to finish，用不定詞，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Playing in the water ___ lots of fun on a hot summer day.
questions.explanation: 動名詞 Playing 作主詞，視為單數，搭配 is，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Dad always tells me not ___ only for tests. If that's all I'm doing, he says, I will soon lose interest in learning.
questions.explanation: tell sb. not to V 固定用法，「告訴我不要只為考試讀書」，用 to study，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Mother makes me ___ my homework every day before I can play video games.
questions.explanation: make 使役動詞後接原形動詞，make me finish，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: ___ the lesson before class gives me a better idea about what the teacher is going to teach.
questions.explanation: 句首需動名詞作主詞，Previewing the lesson 表示「預習課文」，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Playing games on the cellphone ___ popular with high school students.
questions.explanation: 主詞為動名詞片語「用手機玩遊戲」，故動詞應選配合第三人稱單數的 be 動詞 is，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: John always goes to bed late at night, so ___ early is difficult for him.
questions.explanation: 主詞位置需動名詞 getting up（早起），表示「早起對他來說很困難」，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Watching American movies ___ one of the activities we enjoy most in our English class.
questions.explanation: 動名詞 Watching 作主詞（單數），動詞用 is，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: The little boy often asks his father ___ candies and cookies for him.
questions.explanation: ask 後接動詞時，用不定詞 to V 的形式，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: You were ___ not to lend Amy money. She never gives back what she borrows.
questions.explanation: Amy 從來不歸還借的東西，可推知「不借她任何錢」是「明智的」，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Don't let the children swim in the river. We don't know how ___ it is. It could be dangerous.
questions.explanation: 不要讓孩子們在河裡游泳，後句又說可能很危險，可推知是不知道河有多「深」，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: It was ___ for us to answer the math question because we've done the same kind of questions many times.
questions.explanation: 因為已經做過同樣類型的題目很多次，要再作答應該是「容易的」，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Pam is a ___ baseball player; she has more fans than any other player on her team.
questions.explanation: 由後方描述可知 Pam 擁有比任何隊上球員都要多的粉絲，表示她很「受歡迎」，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Bob is ___ of the boys in the family. He never does any housework. His brothers at least take out the garbage sometimes.
questions.explanation: 由後句說明可知 Bob 從不做任何家事，且由比較範圍 of the boys in the family（家庭裡的所有男孩），可知 Bob 是最懶惰的，應用最高級，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: After the fire, everyone in the apartment was ___ when they cooked. They did not want any people to be hurt again.
questions.explanation: 由 be 動詞 was 可知應用形容詞 careful，且由「在那場火災之後」，語意上是表達「比以前」小心，故用比較級 more careful。

questions.stem: My sister thinks red hair is ___ fashionable than black hair.
questions.explanation: 兩者比較用比較級，fashionable 的比較級為 more fashionable，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: This restaurant sells the best steak in Taipei; you can't find ___ steak in the city.
questions.explanation: 由 the best steak in Taipei（臺北最好的牛排）可知，在這裡無法找到「更好吃」的牛排，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: The jacket is ___ than the dress or the pants.
questions.explanation: 比較三者（jacket、dress、pants），jacket 最貴，但句型是 ___ than，為兩者比較，故用比較級 more expensive，選 (C)。

questions.stem: Lucy looks ___ in pants than in dress.
questions.explanation: Lucy 穿褲子看起來比穿裙子好看。由題目中的 than（比......更......）可知答案應選比較級 prettier（較漂亮的）。

questions.stem: For Mike, the price is ___ important thing when he shops for jeans. He cares even more about the shape and the size of the pockets.
questions.explanation: 由後句提到 Mike 甚至更在意牛仔褲的口袋形狀跟大小，可知價錢對他而言，是「最不」重要的，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: The singer sings beautifully. I cannot think of anyone with a ___ voice.
questions.explanation: 找不到比她更好的聲音，比較級 better 表示「更好的」，cannot think of anyone with a better voice，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: There are five stories in this book. The one about a shy police officer is the most ___ to me.
questions.explanation: 故事「對我來說最有趣」，interesting 修飾故事本身，用 interesting（主動），最高級前有 the most，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: In this five-person game, the one who finds ___ hidden balls will win the last free ticket for the movie *A Born Player*.
questions.explanation: 在這場五人競賽中，找到「最多」被藏起來的球的那個人，將可贏到最後免費的電影票。因為電影票只有一張，所以用最高級表示獲勝者的資格。故選 (D)。

questions.stem: When Sean came to Taiwan several years ago, ___ people knew about him. But now he is a famous cook in Taiwan.
questions.explanation: few 修飾可數名詞複數（people），表示「很少人認識他」，故選 (B) few。

questions.stem: ___ other waiters in the restaurant have worked here longer than Clark; only Lois and Lana started working here before him.
questions.explanation: 分號後一句用於補充說明分號前一句的意思。而分號後一句的 him 指前句提到的 Clark；因此，後句在表達只有 Lois 與 Lana 兩人「早於 Clark」在此餐廳工作。所以，前句是說：這餐廳裡「很少數」人「比 Clark 年資久」，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Elsa：Did Eric buy any vegetables in the market? Bob：No, he didn't, but he bought ___ fish.
questions.explanation: 肯定句中 some 表示「一些」，用於建議、提供，Eric 買了「一些」魚，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Business at Jane's shop has not been good these days. And the new supermarket across the street only makes things ___.
questions.explanation: 由前句「這些日子生意本來就不好了」，可推知對面新開的超級市場只會讓事情變得「更糟」；worse 為 bad 的比較級，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: ___ the map that Ryan had drawn for us, we were able to find this beautiful old church.
questions.explanation: 句意為「有 Ryan 畫給我們的地圖，才能......」，應用介系詞 with 表「有......」。

questions.stem: The temple sits alone in the mountains at a height of 3,000m ___ sea level.
questions.explanation: 由高度 3,000 公尺，推知寺廟位於海平面之「上」，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Beverly eats lots of snacks ___ meals. That's why she is often too full to eat anything at mealtimes.
questions.explanation: 正餐時吃不下東西，表示 Beverly 在餐與餐「之間」吃太多零食，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: My dog, Lucy, was lying on the sofa ___ the fan on the wall. So when the fan fell, she was hit right on the head.
questions.explanation: 由後句「Lucy 被從牆上掉落的電風扇打到頭」，可知 Lucy 的位置應在電風扇的「下方」。故選 (A) under（在......下方），表示 Lucy 當時趴在沙發上，而位置是在牆上的電風扇下方。

questions.stem: Lucy and her boyfriend, Daniel, came to Taiwan ___ July 10, 1999.
questions.explanation: 具體日期「7月10日」前用介系詞 on，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: I write down everything about work in my pink notebook; ___ it, I'd forget the things I should do.
questions.explanation: without 表示「沒有它的話」，without my notebook 我就會忘事，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Everyone in the class enjoys playing chess ___ Bill; he thinks the game is boring.
questions.explanation: 分號後面的 he 代表分號前句中所提到的 Bill。既然 Bill「覺得下棋的遊戲無聊」，可推斷分號前方句子的意思是：「除了」Bill 之外，其他人都喜歡下棋，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: I love sports and enjoy playing baseball with friends ___ the school team.
questions.explanation: on the school team 為固定用法，表示「在學校隊伍裡」，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Mr. Yang has worked in this factory ___ 1968.
questions.explanation: 自從1968年起，楊先生就在這個工廠工作了。句子中如有「since＋時間」表示「某件事自從某個時間開始發生」；句子中的動詞時態應為完成式，故正確答案為 (D)。

questions.stem: Tina is getting married to a man she has known only ___ a month.
questions.explanation: for 接一段時間，表示「持續了一個月」，for a month，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Judy moved to France and has lived there ___ two years. I miss her very much.
questions.explanation: for 接時間長度，「住了兩年」用 for two years，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Bill：Have you ever been to Hong Kong? Ted：Yes, ___. It's really a fun place to go.
questions.explanation: Have you ever been 問的是次數或經驗，Ted 回答 twice（兩次），故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Joe：How often does your brother wash his car? Bob：___.
questions.explanation: How often 問的是頻率，答案需是頻率副詞，Every（天）是頻率答法，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Alice：How often do you wash your hair? Betty：___.
questions.explanation: How often 問洗頭頻率，Twice a week（每週兩次）為頻率表達，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Simon is an interesting person. He gets excited ___.
questions.explanation: gets excited 為動詞片語，修飾動詞用副詞 easily，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: George：___ do you practice playing the piano? Tommy：When my mom is at home, I have to practice EVERY DAY, but she's away on a business this week!
questions.explanation: How often 問的是頻率（多久一次），問練鋼琴的頻率，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: All the packages are ___ checked at the airport to keep everyone safe.
questions.explanation: 機場內所有的包裹都被仔細地檢查，以確保乘客的安全。本題測驗副詞修飾動詞的用法。

questions.stem: Have you got anything for Joe ___? He'd be happy to get your gift on his birthday.
questions.explanation: 完成式的句子中，常用副詞 already 與 yet 來表達已經完成或尚未完成的動作，而 yet 常用於疑問句表示「已經」或否定句表示「尚未」，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Allen：George looks strong. Has he ever been sick? Doris：He's a superman! He ___ goes to the doctor.
questions.explanation: Doris 說他是超人，幾乎不去看醫生，seldom（很少）表示低頻率，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Amy: Would you like some coffee? Bill: No, thanks. I ___ drink coffee. Coffee hurts my stomach.
questions.explanation: 咖啡傷胃，所以「很少」喝咖啡，seldom 表低頻率，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: My sister does not like the jacket, and I don't, ___.
questions.explanation: My sister does not like it，我也「不喜歡」，否定句中用 either 表示「也（不）」，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: I sent Lucy two e-mails last week, but she has not answered me ___.
questions.explanation: she has not answered yet，yet 用於否定句或疑問句，表示「還沒」，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Ms. Lee：___ did you get this beautiful card? Mr. Wang：One of my students made it for me. She sends me a card every year.
questions.explanation: 王先生回答了卡片的來源，可知問句是用 where 詢問卡片「從哪裡來的」，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Nancy：Did the teacher tell us ___ to get to the station? Susan：Yes. She said we should meet there at ten.
questions.explanation: 由 Susan的回應 She said we should meet there at ten. （她說我們應該10點在那裡集合。），可推測 Nancy 應該是問集合的「時間」，故空格應選 (C) 。

questions.stem: Alice：Do you know ___ Grandma is going to visit us? Willy：It's next week. She told me on the phone. And we'll take her to the national park.
questions.explanation: 由答句「下週」可推知，間接問句是問「何時」，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Carson：Bye, girls. See you tomorrow, Phoebe. Shirley：___ did Carson say he would see you tomorrow? Phoebe：We're going out for a picnic. Do you want to come?
questions.explanation: Phoebe 的回答內容為原因說明，故選詢問原因的 (D)「為什麼」。

questions.stem: Lucy：___ is Ted doing in the kitchen? Ryan：He's cooking dinner for us.
questions.explanation: Ryan 回答「他在廚房裡煮晚餐」，問的是「在做什麼」，用 What，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Bob：When is Mr. Wang going to Japan? Tim：On ___.
questions.explanation: Tim 回答 On June fourth（六月四日），問的是具體日期，用 When，答案中 On June fourth 為完整日期，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Daisy：I went to Taitung to visit my uncle there. Grace：Really? ___ were you there? Daisy：For two weeks.
questions.explanation: Daisy 回答 For two weeks（兩週），問的是時間長度，用 How long，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Carl：___? Tina：It's three thirty. Why? You look worried. Carl：I have a math test at four o'clock.

options.A: How much money do you have

questions.explanation: Carl 說他四點有考試，看起來很擔心，Tina 知道時間對 Carl 很重要，問的是「現在幾點」，用 What time is it，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Kevin: ___ sweater looks better on me, the red one or the blue one? Betty: The red one, I think.
questions.explanation: Kevin：我穿哪一件毛衣比較好看，紅色的還是藍色的？ Betty：我覺得紅色的比較好。根據上下文，Kevin 請 Betty 做一選擇，所以應選 which（哪一個）。

questions.stem: Robert：Where are the boys playing? Barbie：___
questions.explanation: Robert 問 Where（在哪裡），Barbie 回答 Under the tree（在樹下）表示地點，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Sarah：___ does your little sister get up? Willy：About six.
questions.explanation: Willy 回答 About six（大約六點），問的是時間，用 What time，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Susan：Do you know ___ you have talked on the phone? Aren't you thirsty? Walter：Oh, come on! I've only talked for thirty minutes!
questions.explanation: 你知不知道你講電話講了多久？你不渴啊？噢，拜託！我才講三十分鐘而已！(A) 多大 (B) 多常 (C) 多少 (D) 多久。依據上下文，本題問的是時間的長短，故選「多久」。

questions.stem: Kathy: ___ your French class, Jerry? Jerry: I couldn't understand a word the first month, but it's getting better now.
questions.explanation: Jerry 回答他的法文課情況（進展如何），問的是課程狀況，用 How's，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Mr. Wang：___ are the children? Ms. Chen：They're having fun in the playground.
questions.explanation: Ms. Chen 回答「他們在操場上玩」，問的是「孩子們在哪裡」，用 Where，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Mrs. Wang：___ are your children? Mrs. Lin：Ted is five. Peter is eight.
questions.explanation: Mrs. Lin 回答兩個孩子的年齡，問的是年齡，用 How old，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Emma：___ umbrella is it? Sherry：It's Ann's. She forgot to take it home.
questions.explanation: Ann 忘記把傘帶走，問的是「誰的」雨傘，用 Whose，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Anita：I saw Nora in the teacher's office this morning. Do you know ___ she was there? Brian：She cheated on tests.
questions.explanation: 由 Brian 的回答「她考試作弊」以及 Anita 說「我今天早上看到 Nora 在老師的辦公室裡」可知，Anita 應是詢問「為什麼她在那裡」，故選用來詢問原因的疑問詞 why。

questions.stem: Ken：___ is a boat ticket for children? Paul：How old is your child? It's free for kids under three years old.
questions.explanation: Paul 問孩子幾歲（三歲以下免費），問的是船票「多少錢」，用 How much，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Lisa is new here, so she doesn't know ___ the restaurant is.
questions.explanation: Lisa 不知道餐廳「在哪裡」，間接問句用 where，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Son：Mom, ___ are my glasses? Mom：Aren't they on the table in the living room?
questions.explanation: Mom 回答「不是在客廳的桌上嗎？」，問的是眼鏡「在哪裡」，用 where，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Jill：Have you decided ___ you will celebrate your 30^th^ birthday? Sue：Yeah, I'm going to have a big barbecue party.
questions.explanation: 由 Sue 回答「舉辦烤肉派對」可知 Jill 詢問是否決定「如何」慶祝生日了，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Teacher：Does anyone know ___ the famous writer was born? Mei-ling：I know! In Taitung, right? Teacher：You got it!
questions.explanation: 由 Mei-ling 的回答「在臺東」可知，老師是詢問那位知名的作家出生在「哪裡」，故選 (C)。

topics.name: 主題11 名詞子句、間接問句

questions.stem: Willy found ___ the novel he bought last week was under his bed.
questions.explanation: found ___ the novel was under his bed，引導名詞子句表「事實」用 that，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Jacky would like to bring that poor dog back home, but he isn't sure ___ his mother likes dogs.
questions.explanation: Jacky想把那隻可憐的狗兒帶回家，但他不確定他媽媽是否喜歡狗。(A) 如何 (B) 什麼 (C) 是否 (D) 何者。whether為「是否」，後接子句，表示「不知是否喜歡狗」。

questions.stem: A- wei：This typhoon is so terrible! A- fen：Yes, I'm not sure ___ we can still go fishing tomorrow.
questions.explanation: not sure ___ we can go fishing，表示「不確定是否」用 whether，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Alice learned from the TV news ___ Nora Jones was coming to Taiwan the next day.
questions.explanation: learned ___ Nora Jones was coming，引導名詞子句表「事實」用 that，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: I'm not sure if Kevin ___ this morning, but if he does, I'll tell him that you called.
questions.explanation: 第一個 if 為 whether / if 引導名詞子句的用法，子句中的時態依事實表示；第二個 if 為條件句，子句中的時態以現在式表示未來；再由上下文判斷，說話者並不知道 Kevin 是否會來，表示 Kevin 尚未出現，故選表示未來時態的 (A)。

questions.stem: My father told me last night ___ we're going to the Food Festival this weekend. My brother and I felt very excited.
questions.explanation: 此句是 that 所引導的名詞子句作為 told 的受詞，以說明父親昨晚所說的事情，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: I was surprised to know from the newspaper yesterday ___ flowers do not always smell sweet; some can smell like dead fish.
questions.explanation: 子句 flowers do not always smell sweet 句意完整，不缺主詞、受詞、時間或地點，因此此子句應為 that 引導的名詞子句當主要子句 know 的受詞，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Jerry wanted to know ___ he was kicked off the soccer team, but no one gave him a good reason.
questions.explanation: 由後句「但沒有人給他一個充分的理由」，可推知 Jerry 想知道自己「為什麼」被踢出球隊，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Fiona loves listening to her children sing songs ___ at school.
questions.explanation: Fiona...songs 為完整句，因此空格應填入關係子句，用來形容名詞 songs。選項 (A) 與 (B) 缺主詞；選項 (D) 則多了個主詞 they，放入句中語意不清。選項 (C) 可形成省略受格 that / which 的關係子句，而 they 指 children，表「孩童在學校學的歌曲」，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: James：Do you see the street vendor over there? Philip：Which one? James：The one ___ is wearing a hat.
questions.explanation: 先行詞 the one 指人，關係子句中作主詞，用 who，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: I need someone ___ his work to take out the garbage for me.
questions.explanation: someone ___ has finished his work，先行詞指人作主詞，用 who has finished，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: The movie is about a true story ___ happened in Korea in 1945.
questions.explanation: 先行詞 a true story 為事物，關係子句中作主詞，用 that，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Actor David Piper became tired of talking about the movie ___ after he was interviewed about it many times.
questions.explanation: be famous for... 表「以......聞名」，而關係代名詞於關係子句中當受格時可以省略，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Eva：What's your ideal mate like? Ada：Well, I want a husband who ___ well. I enjoy eating, but I hate kitchens.
questions.explanation: 先行詞 a husband 指人，關係子句主詞，用 who，且第三人稱單數動詞 cooks，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: I like to read comic books ___ me laugh.
questions.explanation: 我喜歡看會逗我笑的漫畫書。本題是測驗關係代名詞的用法；comic books 為物，故關係代名詞應用 which 或 that，而本題的先行詞為複數，動詞用原形即可，正確答案為 (C)。

questions.stem: Do you remember the girl ___ looked worried at the train station yesterday?
questions.explanation: 先行詞 the girl 指人，關係子句中作主詞，用 who，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: The boys ___ are coming to my office tomorrow were my students five years ago.
questions.explanation: 先行詞 The boys 指人複數，關係子句中作主詞，用 who，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: At dinner time, I often enjoy telling Mom everything ___ at school.
questions.explanation: everything ___ happened at school，先行詞為 everything，用 that，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: All the excuses Nick made ___ a lot about how much he hates to do the job.
questions.explanation: excuse 意為「藉口」，依句子結構，在此當主詞，後面應該接動詞，卻出現人名 Nick，可判斷 Nick made 為省略關係代名詞 that / which 的形容詞子句（原句為 that / which Nick made），而空格的位置才是該填入搭配複數名詞 excuses 的動詞，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: The new medicine that just came out on the market ___ thousands of lives.
questions.explanation: that just came out on the market 為修飾 The new medicine 的關係子句，本句主詞為 The new medicine，且缺少動詞，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Students ___ to go on the school trip should ask their parents first.
questions.explanation: 由句子結構可知需用關係代名詞修飾先行詞 students，表示「想參加學校旅遊的學生」，且關係代名詞在句中當主詞，不可省略，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: The movie starts at two o'clock, ___ let's meet at the theater at one forty-five.
questions.explanation: 後半句說「要一點四十五在戲院碰面」是前句「電影兩點開始」的結果，故用 so（所以）連接，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: John：Will you be at Linda's party this Sunday? I'd like you to meet my girlfriend. Tony：Sure, if Linda ___ me. But I haven't got any call yet.
questions.explanation: 因為「還沒收到邀請」，可知 if 是表未來的條件句，此時應用現在簡單式代替未來式，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: The famous writer likes to write at this coffee shop. He comes in the early morning and stays here writing ___ it is closed.
questions.explanation: until 表「直到......為止」，指持續做某件事情直到某時間點，句意為一直待在咖啡廳「直到」它關門。

questions.stem: Jimmy would not get up for breakfast, ___ his dad had already tried to pull him from his bed several times.
questions.explanation: 此處的 would 表「意願」，would not 便是「拒絕；不願」；依題意，「雖然」父親已經試了多次，Jimmy 依然拒絕起床吃早餐，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: I can't find my history book, ___ I know it's somewhere in the living room.
questions.explanation: 前句提到「找不到歷史課本」，而後句提到「知道它在客廳的某處」，前後句為語意相反的語句，要用連接詞 but 連接，故選(B)。

questions.stem: Ms. Liu usually gives us a lot of homework, ___ she didn't give us any today.
questions.explanation: 由前句「劉老師通常給我們很多回家作業」及後句「她今天沒有給我們任何（作業）」可知，空格應選含有轉折語氣的連接詞 but，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Mr. Hu speaks good English ___ he lived in the U.S. for many years.
questions.explanation: 前句「胡先生能說流利的英文」和後句「他在美國住了很多年」，兩句語意為因果關係，且後句表「原因」，故用 because（因為）來連接兩句，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: ___ going shopping, Dad asked me if Mom would eat at home tonight. He wanted to know what he should buy for the dinner.
questions.explanation: 由「爸爸要知道自己該買什麼」，可推測爸爸是在外出購物「之前」詢問，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Tonight I'll stay at an office until I ___ the work.
questions.explanation: 以 until 連接的時間子句中，用現在簡單式來描述將來的事情，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: If the weather is fine this weekend, my family ___ to the beach for two days.
questions.explanation: If 子句條件句（現在式），主句用未來式 will go，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Josh has planned to make a trip to New York and \_\_\_\_\_ some of his friends there.
questions.explanation: 本句 planned 後面用 and 連接兩個to+V，and後面省略 to，兩者形式應一致，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: If Frank ___ to the office tonight, give this package to him.
questions.explanation: If Frank ___ to the office tonight，條件子句用現在式 comes，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: I have to catch the bus right now, ___ I'll miss my brother's birthday party.
questions.explanation: have to catch the bus（必須搭上那班公車）表示不想錯過某件事情，故選具有避免壞結果含意的連接詞 (C)「否則；要不然」。

questions.stem: Enya got up early this morning ___ she did not want to be late for her trip.
questions.explanation: Enya 早起是「因為」不想遲到，用 because 表原因，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: A-hong can speak two foreign languages, ___ his brothers can\'t.
questions.explanation: A-hong 會說兩種外語，「但是」他的兄弟不會，用 but 表對比，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Elsa hates going shopping, ___ she went last night when her grandpa asked her to buy some medicine for him.
questions.explanation: 由前句 Elsa 討厭去逛街購物可知，後句她昨晚為了爺爺請她買藥而去購物，可推知兩句在語氣上不相符。用連接詞 but 做語氣上的轉折最合適，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Jane：I heard you went to Yangmingshan last spring vacation. Dick：We not only visited the park ___ took a hot-spring bath. It was a great trip.
questions.explanation: not only...but also 固定搭配，「不只...還...」，故選 (B) but also。

questions.stem: Linda：Jenny, will you still be here this afternoon? Jenny：Yeah, I think I'll stay ___ five. Then I'll leave for dinner.
questions.explanation: 由回應 Yeah（是啊）可知 Jenny 會留在這裡，又後句表示 Then I'll leave for dinner.（然後我才會離開去吃晚餐。），可知 Jenny 會留在這裡「直到」五點，故選 (D) until。

questions.stem: John felt much better ___ he took the medicine the doctor gave him.
questions.explanation: John 吃了藥「之後」感覺好多了，after 表時間先後，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Mr. Green was very angry with his daughter ___ she always put her dirty socks on the dinning table.
questions.explanation: Green先生非常生他女兒的氣，因為她總是把她的髒襪子放在餐桌上。(A) 雖然 (B) 因為 (C) 但是 (D) 直到。由題目前後可得知本題是在闡述因果關係的兩個句子；前句是結果（生氣），後句是原因（髒襪子放在餐桌上），用對等連接詞來連接兩句，所以最適合的答案為 (B)。

questions.stem: My grandmother believes that young children in big cities get sick easily ___ the air is dirty.
questions.explanation: 年輕孩子生病「因為」空氣污染，用 because 表原因，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Dad：Are you going out? It's really late now. Mitch：I know, but it's the last day to buy tickets to the World Cup games, ___ I must go.
questions.explanation: 由 Mitch 上一句表示 it's the last day to buy tickets to the World Cup game（今天是世界盃比賽售票的最後一天），可知雖然 Mitch 知道時間很晚了，但是因為今天是售票的最後一天，「所以」他還是一定要出門，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: ___ Annie knows fast food is not good for her health, she still eats it.
questions.explanation: 四個選項均為連接詞，分別為 (A)「雖然」、(B)「因為」、(C)「如果」、(D)「當」。主要子句的關鍵字為「仍舊吃」速食，依文意應選 (A)。

questions.stem: Da-fa is cleaning the house ___ some of his friends are coming for dinner.
questions.explanation: Da-fa 打掃「因為」朋友要來吃晚飯，because 表原因，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: It was an exciting moment for Mr. and Mrs. Wang ___ they learned that they were going to have a baby.
questions.explanation: It was an exciting moment ___ they learned...，「當他們得知...時」用 when，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: It was very hot when we got to Kenting National Park, ___ we still had a good time there.
questions.explanation: 雖然天氣很熱，「但是」還是玩得開心，but 表轉折，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Sue is very sick and has to stop working for several weeks. But ___ she feels better, she will get back to work.
questions.explanation: as soon as 表「一...就...」，一感覺好些就回去工作，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: This dress is pretty, ___ it does not look good on me.
questions.explanation: 主要子句的 is pretty（是美麗的），與附屬子句的 does not look good（看起來並不好看），有語意上的轉折、反差，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: ___ Joe looks strong, in fact he gets sick easily.
questions.explanation: 雖然 Joe 看起來強壯，「但事實上」容易生病，Though 表讓步，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Don't go away when you're cooking, ___ the food might burn.
questions.explanation: Don't go away，「否則」食物會燒焦，or 表否定條件結果，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: If we play some interesting games in class, there ___ more fun in learning English.
questions.explanation: If 條件句（現在式），主句用未來式 will be，There will be more fun，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Do you remember the CD I was looking for for months? I ___ found it in a small shop. Look, here it is!
questions.explanation: 終於（finally）在小店裡找到了，finally 表示「最終」，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Patty spent several days planning to invite Charlie to dinner, ___ she couldn't say a word when they met.
questions.explanation: 由前後句的對比關係可知，雖然計畫了好幾天，但見面時卻說不出話來，用 but 連接表示轉折，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: John will stay with his sister until he ___ an apartment.
questions.explanation: until 引導的時間副詞子句，用現在簡單式表未來，故選 (C)。

topics.name: 主題14 特殊句構（there is、祈使句、附加問句、used to等）

questions.stem: If you're interested in our business plan, ___ this number and ask for Ms. Lee. She'll answer your questions.
questions.explanation: if 子句描述的情況若有可能在將來發生，主要子句除了用現在簡單式表未來外，亦有祈使句的結構；另，對等連接詞 and 用來連接文法功能相同的字詞，而此處 and 後面為原形動詞 ask，可判斷本題主要子句為祈使句結構，空格應填入「原形動詞」，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Lora likes to eat bananas that are already a little brown on the outside, and so ___ I.
questions.explanation: 本題考附和句，前句是現在簡單式一般動詞，且後句主詞是 I，因此附和句助動詞要用 do，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: There ___ more than twenty clubs in our school. Which one would you like to join?
questions.explanation: 表達「在......有......」時，須使用 there is / are 句型，本句主詞為「超過二十個社團」，須選複數 be動詞 are，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Jenny：How many countries ___ in Europe? Betty：I\'m not sure.
questions.explanation: How many countries ___ in Europe？There are...句型，疑問形式為 are there，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Oscar：I\'m going to the museum. Bus Number 286 goes there, ___? David：Yes, but you can take a Number 287, too.
questions.explanation: Bus 286 goes there，附加問句與前句動詞一致，goes 為第三人稱單數現在式，附加問句用 doesn't it，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Rose：It\'s time to go to bed. You have to get up early tomorrow, ___? Nina：Yes, my class is going hiking tomorrow.
questions.explanation: You have to get up early，have to 的附加問句用 don't you，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Playing video games is fun, ___?
questions.explanation: Playing video games is fun，主詞為動名詞（視為單數），附加問句用 isn't it，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Judy：The ball game will be on TV tomorrow at six in the morning. Lucy: ___ up early and you won't miss it.
questions.explanation: 祈使句（叫人採取行動），動詞原形放句首，Get up early，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Somewhere along the road, ___ a shop which sells things from foreign countries.
questions.explanation: 本句將地方副詞放句首引導表示強調，原句為 There is a shop somewhere along the road.，故選 (D)。另三個選項的指示代名詞 that 與代名詞 it 若放於句中，所指不明，故不選。

questions.stem: In my school days, I ___ to English radio programs every day. That was how I learned English at that time.
questions.explanation: 關鍵為第一句表達「狀態或習慣」的 every day，以及下一句的「過去式」時態；由此可推斷，第一句是在說明「過去的習慣」，要表達「過去的習慣，現在無此習慣」，須用「used to＋原形動詞」，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Wendy：Do you know where the library is? Simon：Just ___ going for two more blocks and you'll see it.
questions.explanation: Wendy：你知不知道圖書館在哪裡？\ Simon：只要再直走兩個街區你就會看見了。\ 本句為祈使句的用法，故使用原形動詞。

questions.stem: My husband ___ send me flowers every week before we got married. But now he never does.
questions.explanation: used to 表示「過去習慣」，現在已不再做，used to send 表過去曾送花，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: ___ carefully before you buy a new house.
questions.explanation: 祈使句動詞原形放句首，Think carefully，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: A-ming：Dad, can I go dancing tomorrow? Mr. Wu：___ your homework and we\'ll talk about it.
questions.explanation: 祈使句動詞原形放句首，Finish your homework，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: ___ a map with you when you go to a place for the first time.
questions.explanation: 依句子結構，when 之前為主要子句，而主要子句缺主詞與動詞，因此空格要填入省略主詞 You 的動詞 Take 以形成祈使句結構，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Paul：What did you find under his desk? Tom：Oh. ___ all kinds of things：a basketball, pencils, a hat, and fries!
questions.explanation: 找到的東西是多種物品（複數），there were all kinds of things，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: Grace: How many people ___ in the office when the fire happened? Harry: Five. Luckily, nobody got hurt.
questions.explanation: Grace：火災發生時有多少人在辦公室裡？\ Harry：五個人。幸運的是，沒有人受傷。

questions.stem: The tall man over there is our new English teacher, ___?
questions.explanation: The tall man...is our new English teacher，附加問句與 is 相反，用 isn't he，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Robert：Charles wanted to borrow \$1,000 from me yesterday. Mandy：You didn't lend him the oney, ___?
questions.explanation: You didn't lend him the money，附加問句與前句相反（否定→肯定），用 did you，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: ___ will be a welcome party next week for the new students. Will you come with me?
questions.explanation: There will be a welcome party，There 作引導詞，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: Lucy: Do you think Sally and Martin should get married? Rose: Why not? They love each other, ___?
questions.explanation: They love each other，附加問句與 love 相反，用 don't they，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: Getting up early on a cold morning is not easy, ___?
questions.explanation: 本題考附加問句。主要句子中動詞為 is，而動名詞 Getting up 為主詞，於附加問句中應改為代名詞 it，故選 (D)。

questions.stem: When I entered the house for the first time, I found ___ was a big round table in the living room.
questions.explanation: 本句句意為「第一次進到房子之後，我發現客廳有一個大圓桌」，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Alice really likes having noodles for breakfast, ___?
questions.explanation: 句中的動詞為現在式 likes，並為肯定句，故附加問句用 doesn't she，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: (In the teachers\' office) Miss Huang：Sue, ___ students in the classroom? Miss Cheng：I don\'t think so. School\'s over. Miss Huang：But I hear people talking over there.
questions.explanation: Are there any students...？There be 句型的疑問形式，故選 (D) are there。

questions.stem: Now we have to take a taxi home because ___ are no buses after eleven o'clock.
questions.explanation: there are no buses，there 作引導詞表示「有...」的存在，故選 (B)。

questions.stem: She's going to Europe, ___ she?
questions.explanation: She's going to Europe，附加問句與 is 相反，用 isn't she，故選 (C)。

questions.stem: Grace：How many pencils ___ in your pencil box? Allen：Only one.
questions.explanation: How many pencils ___ in your pencil box？複數 pencils，用 are there，故選 (A)。

questions.stem: You've studied English for a long time, ___?
questions.explanation: You've studied English for a long time，附加問句與 have 相反，用 haven't you，故選 (D)。
